description: Canonical survey schema that normalizes all form versions (v1, v2, new) into a single standardized structure

identity_and_social_style.social_experiences: array of strings (up to 3 from: live_music, clubs, lounges, rooftops, underground, creative_spaces, community_events, food_hospitality)
identity_and_social_style.decision_factors: array of strings (up to 3 from: music, crowd_vibe, friends_going, atmosphere, exclusivity, comfort, pricing, networking, discovery, familiarity)
identity_and_social_style.social_personality: enum: high_energy_seeker | intimate_preference | discovery_explorer | trusted_places_preference | mood_dependent | unknown

discovery_and_attention.discovery_channels: array of strings (up to 3 from: instagram, friends, whatsapp_groups, influencers, djs_artists, google_maps, event_platforms, walking_past)
discovery_and_attention.attention_grabbers: array of strings (up to 3 from: crowd_energy, music_lineup, interior_aesthetic, friend_reposts, exclusivity, limited_tickets, celebrity_presence, unique_concept)
discovery_and_attention.crowd_reaction: enum: makes_more_interested | depends_on_crowd | neutral | makes_avoid | unknown

fomo_and_decision_triggers.fomo_tendency: enum: often | sometimes | rarely | never | unknown
fomo_and_decision_triggers.quick_decision_triggers: array of strings (up to 3 from: friends_going, limited_spots, great_lineup, spontaneous_mood, exclusive_access, trending_online)
fomo_and_decision_triggers.choice_overload_behavior: enum: decide_quickly | compare_carefully | ask_friends | go_familiar | lose_interest | unknown

group_dynamics.group_role: enum: organizer | recommender | follower | spontaneous_one | depends_on_situation | unknown
group_dynamics.recommendation_frequency: enum: very_often | sometimes | rarely | never | unknown
group_dynamics.group_influence: enum: frequently_skip | sometimes_skip | rarely_skip | never_skip | unknown

environment_and_habits.atmosphere_preference: enum: high_energy_social | intimate_cozy | premium_exclusive | creative_artistic | calm_conversation_focused | unknown
environment_and_habits.music_preferences: object: {volume: bool, familiar_songs: bool, energy: bool, live_performance: bool, background_vibe: bool, ability_to_talk: bool, crowd_mood: bool}

purpose_and_spend.primary_purpose: enum: food_drink | work_chill | entertainment | socializing | celebration | unknown
purpose_and_spend.spend_drivers: array of strings (factors that make them spend more)

specific_venues_and_behaviors.favorite_places: array of strings (names of places they visit often)
specific_venues_and_behaviors.recommendation_criteria: string (text - what makes a place recommendable)

community_and_access.access_interests: array of strings (from: early_access, secret_events, artist_showcases, venue_recs, community_meetups, networking, music_discovery, creative_collabs)
community_and_access.community_seeking: boolean (whether they're interested in community features)

derived_fields.archetype: string (computed from social_personality + energy_preference + place_preference, e.g., 'Calm Pairs', 'Party Group', 'Discovery Explorer')
derived_fields.retention_drivers: array of strings (key factors that make them stay/return)

v2_detailed_form.form_name: Help us design better experiences_This takes 60–90 seconds. _Submissions_2026-05-12.csv

notes.archetype_computation: Use combination of: social_personality (identity), energy_preference (activation level), discovery_channels (how they find), group_role (social position), place_preference (exploration), and music_preferences to compute user archetype
notes.acquisition_signals: High acquisition readiness when: high_fomo_tendency + active_discovery + access_interests + community_seeking
notes.retention_signals: Retention drivers extracted from: what_makes_stay_longer + what_drives_return + why_favorite + music_preferences
notes.data_quality: v1 has partial data (missing detailed preferences), v2 is comprehensive, new form is acquisition-focused
